name: Spicy Chicken Sandwich
description: Crispy fried chicken thigh with house-made sriracha aioli, pickled jalapeños, shredded cabbage, and brioche bun.

name: Bistro Burger
description: 8oz grass-fed beef patty, aged cheddar, caramelized onions, arugula, and house bistro sauce on a toasted sesame bun.

name: Truffle Fries
description: Hand-cut fries tossed in truffle oil and parmesan, served with house aioli dipping sauce.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine hearts, house-made Caesar dressing, shaved parmesan, sourdough croutons, and lemon zest.

name: Tomato Basil Soup
description: Slow-roasted San Marzano tomatoes blended with fresh basil, a touch of cream, and house-baked bread.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Chilled sparkling mineral water served with lemon or lime.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a molten center, served with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream and raspberry coulis.
